title: Harthamah b. Aryan Restores Order in If igiyah
description: In this year occurred the uprising of the people of Ifrigiyah against 'Abdawayh al-Anbiri and the troops of the army who were with him there. As a result, al-Fail b. Rawh b. Hatim was killed and the members of the house of al-Muhallab there were expelled.519 So alRashid sent Harthamah b. A'yan against them, and they returned to their obedience.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
